mainEntity.name: How to fix inconsistent NAP hurting Chicago law firm AI visibility?
mainEntity.text: How to fix inconsistent NAP hurting Chicago law firm AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Audit 40+ directories with tools like Moz Local, correct discrepancies, add schema markup, and verify Google Business Profile. Rebuilds AI trust in 4-8 weeks.

suggestedAnswer.text: Chicago firms suffer AI penalties from mismatched addresses across Avvo/Yelp. Use BrightLocal for bulk fixes, then monitor citations. Consistent NAP boosts map pack and AI recs by 40%. Post-fix, add Chicago-specific FAQs. Warning: Opposing counsel uses directories for due diligence.

name: Fixing NAP Inconsistencies for Chicago AI Visibility
description: Audit 40+ directories with tools like Moz Local, correct discrepancies, add schema markup, and verify Google Business Profile. Rebuilds AI trust in 4-8 weeks.
